tool_call payload: need selector string? For session.expand_file@v1, payload includes target_selector and optional fields. Use target_selector: "crates/graphbench-core/src/artifacts.rs". Possibly include depth: 1? But we can keep minimal.

Thus JSON:

  "kind":"tool_call",
  "assistant_message":"expanding file symbols for artifacts.rs to capture schema version constants",
